overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting first-person night driving through a rain-slicked neon metropolis. The player navigates a futuristic vehicle through commercial districts, elevated highways, and busy intersections while following a white van. The scene features dense cyberpunk architecture with holographic billboards, cherry blossom trees, and reflective wet asphalt illuminated by vibrant neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial street beneath elevated highway with dense neon signage

events.description: entering covered corridor beneath concrete overpass structure with reduced natural light
navigating gentle right curve while maintaining speed behind lead vehicle

agents.ego_description: following a white van through covered commercial streets, passing under concrete overpasses with neon signage reflecting on wet pavement

notable_agents.action: white van maintaining steady speed ahead through covered corridor

entered.detail: elevated highway structure creating covered corridor over the street with concrete pillars
large pink neon sign with stylized text mounted on building facade
multi-story futuristic commercial structures with illuminated windows and holographic displays
tall glass and steel buildings with various neon advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person driving perspective beneath an elevated highway structure in a neon-lit cyberpunk city. The vehicle follows a white van through a covered commercial corridor where the wet asphalt reflects pink and blue neon signs, including a prominent 'WET DREAMS' sign on the right. The concrete overpass creates a sheltered environment with artificial lighting dominating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial intersection district with decorative cherry trees

events.description: executing right turn at intersection with crosswalk markings
passing beneath second overpass structure with cherry blossom trees visible on sidewalk

agents.ego_description: navigating through intersection by turning right, then continuing through commercial area lined with cherry blossom trees

notable_agents.action: white van navigating the right turn and continuing ahead on new street

entered.detail: decorative trees with pink blossoms lining the sidewalk
second elevated highway structure spanning across the road ahead
tall modern street lamps with blue-white illumination

segments.scene_description: The vehicle executes a right turn at an intersection, exiting the covered corridor into an open commercial area. Cherry blossom trees with pink flowers line the right sidewalk, contrasting with the cyberpunk architecture. The camera passes beneath a second overpass structure while following the white van, with modern street lights visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: broad urban avenue with palm trees and large commercial towers

events.description: emerging from covered area into open highway section with visible palm trees and broader skyline
navigating broad left curve while accelerating along multi-lane avenue

agents.ego_description: accelerating along wider urban boulevard passing the Langley building, with palm trees lining the street and other vehicles overtaking

notable_agents.action: blue sedan overtaking on the right side at high speed
white van continuing ahead at increased distance

entered.detail: tall commercial skyscraper with illuminated signage near the top
tall palm trees lining the right side of the broad avenue
massive digital advertisement screen displaying animated neon content
concrete divider separating lanes with reflective strips

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a broader urban avenue with the Langley building visible on the left and palm trees lining the right side. The vehicle accelerates along the multi-lane road, passing beneath another overpass and navigating a gentle curve. A blue sedan overtakes on the right while the camera passes a massive vertical billboard displaying animated advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with pedestrian crosswalks and dense commercial signage

events.description: approaching intersection with red traffic light, beginning to slow down
stopping at crosswalk to allow pedestrians to cross the street

agents.ego_description: approaching intersection, slowing for red traffic light, and coming to complete stop to wait for pedestrians crossing in front of vehicle

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street on crosswalk in front of stopped vehicle
yellow taxi waiting at the intersection traffic light

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with yellow zebra stripes spanning the multi-lane road
suspended traffic signal array showing red light above the intersection
ground-level commercial building with bright interior lighting and large windows

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle approaching a busy intersection, slowing down for a red traffic light. The camera stops at a crosswalk where pedestrians are crossing the street. A yellow taxi waits at the light on the left, while neon signs and commercial buildings surround the intersection. The wet pavement continues to reflect the vibrant city lights as the vehicle comes to a complete stop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person driving perspective that transitions from a sheltered, neon-drenched corridor into an open commercial district. It begins beneath the heavy concrete of an elevated highway, following a white van through a covered passage where pink and blue neon signs, including a prominent Wet Dreams sign, reflect off the rain-slicked asphalt. As the vehicle executes a right turn at an intersection, the scene opens up and shifts from the artificial glow of the overpass to a more expansive urban environment. The camera then glides past vibrant pink cherry blossom trees lining the sidewalk, contrasting the organic flora with the surrounding cyberpunk architecture. The movement finally carries the vehicle beneath a second overpass structure, continuing the pursuit of the van under the light of modern street lamps.

The shot follows a continuous drive through a neon-lit urban avenue that transitions from a high-speed stretch of road into a crowded city intersection. It begins with the vehicle accelerating along a multi-lane road, passing the Langley building and palm trees before navigating a gentle curve beneath an overpass. As the camera glides past a massive vertical billboard with animated advertisements, a blue sedan overtakes the vehicle on the right. The scene then shifts as the car approaches a busy intersection, gradually slowing down for a red traffic light. Finally, the vehicle comes to a complete stop at a crosswalk filled with pedestrians, surrounded by yellow taxis and vibrant neon signs reflecting off the rain-slicked pavement.
